title: Fix UVM elaboration of package dotted reference
body:
Fix UVM elaboration of package dotted reference.  This is one of a few remaining blockers to UVM #1538.

This can be seen by editing test_regress/t/t_uvm_all.pl to remove --debug-exit-uvm.

```
%Error: t/t_uvm_pkg_all.vh:8117:64: Can't find definition of scope/variable/func: 'm_t_inst'
 8117 |           qr = uvm_callbacks#(uvm_report_object,uvm_callback)::m_t_inst.m_tw_cb_q;
      |                                                                ^~~~~~~~
```
